title: Who is suspect in White House press dinner shooting? What we know
shortDescription: A law enforcement official identified the shooter to USA TODAY as Cole Tomas Allen, of Torrance, California. Here's what we know about him.

title: What to know about the Blair House in Washington DC
shortDescription: King Charles III and Queen Camilla are coming to Washington DC coming. A look at Blair House, the President't guest home where they're staying.

title: White House to review security with Secret Service after shooting
shortDescription: White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles will review the president's security with the Secret Service after gunfire erupted outside a dinner he attended

title: Trump says 'I'm not a pedophile' in interview
shortDescription: President Donald Trump sat with Norah O’Donnell in a ’60 Minutes’ interview after a gunman opened fire at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner.

title: Wisconsin Dems condemn liberal backer's Trump assassination post
shortDescription: A spokesman for the Wisconsin Democratic Party called comments from Kirk Bangstad, owner of the Minocqua Brewing Company, "completely unacceptable."

title: 'I have the right to vote.' States and the DOJ are fighting over personal data
shortDescription: Department of Justice is battling states to review voter rolls with personal information, which civil rights lawyers call 'Big Brother.' Here's why.

title: Security incidents that marked Trump’s rise
shortDescription: Trump has faced multiple assassination attempts, security incidents and violent threats throughout his political career, most recently in Washington.

title: Trump says King Charles visit will go ahead
shortDescription: In an interview on Fox News on Sunday morning, President Trump said an upcoming state visit with King Charles III would continue as planned.

title: Trump says shooting proves need for WH ballroom
shortDescription: President Trump said the attack on the White House Correspondents' Dinner underlines the need for his embattled ballroom addition to the White House.

title: Key GOP senator says he'll support Trump's Fed chair pick
shortDescription: Sen. Thom Tillis hailed the Trump administration's decision to end its probe of Fed Chair Powell, easing the way for Kevin Warsh to take the helm.

title: Video shows Trump, Vance rushed off at dinner
shortDescription: Eyewitness video showed President Trump, Vice President JD Vance and cabinet members being rushed out of the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

title: It is first lady Melania Trump's birthday. What has she done this year?
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump was once often out of the public eye as first lady. But this year she has made news repeatedly with her movie and more.

title: Suspected DC gunman 'likely' targeted Trump, official says
shortDescription: The suspect who officials say opened fire at the White House correspondents' dinner will be arraigned Monday on multiple charges, officials said.

title: Tuxedos, satin gowns and a surreal White House briefing after shooting
shortDescription: The president and reporters were dressed up for a party at the Washington Hilton. They ended up at the White House for a briefing on another shooting.

title: Polls show Democrats ahead before midterms. Could Georgia turn blue?
shortDescription: Democrats have been over performing in special elections in Georgia and are bringing momentum into the midterm elections. Could Georgia go blue?
